<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\Exception; /** * An interrupt exception, used when Ctrl-C interrupts running code. * * Unlike BreakException, this does not exit the REPL, it only cancels * the current execution and returns to the prompt. */ class InterruptException extends \Exception implements Exception { /** * Return a raw (unformatted) version of the error message. */ public function getRawMessage(): string { return $this->getMessage(); } }
